title: leptolepidium leptolepis
intro: Leptolepidium leptolepis, also known as Mountain Wintergreen or Mountain Pyrola, is a small, perennial plant that belongs to the family Ericaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Leptolepidium leptolepis has been found to have various health benefits, such as soothing sore throats and reducing fever, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, and is often used to make teas and salves that can be applied topically to aid in wound healing.
